svg.text: Can you explain how the Cross-Talk Protocol works in Omni-Grid?
The Cross-Talk Protocol enables widgets to share data via drag-and-drop.
When you drag content from one widget and drop it onto another, a custom
DragEvent payload carries the widget type and data. The receiving widget
processes the payload and updates its state accordingly.
Ask Gemini anything about your workspace...
Press Ctrl+K for Command Palette | Ctrl+, for Settings
